description: You are a production assistant at DataWave Advertising. Assemble a 15-second radio commercial spot in the 'MyProject' Ardour session. Rename the existing piano track to 'Music Bed' and import the voiceover from /home/ga/Audio/import_me.wav onto a new track named 'Voiceover'. Edit the music bed to be approximately 15 seconds long, applying both a fade-in and a fade-out. Adjust the 'Music Bed' track gain so it sits appropriately under the voiceover. Mark the beginning and end of the spot with session markers named 'Spot Start' and 'Spot End', then save the session.
